initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Bad', 'Neutral', 'Good'] THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Bad', 'Neutral', 'Good'] AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment IN ('Good', 'Bad', 'Neutral') AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('bad', 'neutral') AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;
